title: 10 best herbal teas for lymph node swelling
intro_desc: Herbal teas for lymph node swelling are a natural remedy that helps alleviate swelling and promote healing by stimulating lymphatic function and reducing inflammation. The best herbal teas for lymph node swelling include Echinacea purpurea, Taraxacum officinale, Ginkgo biloba, Urtica dioica, Silybum marianum, Echinacea angustifolia, Astragalus membranaceus, Achillea millefolium, Equisetum arvense, and Arctium lappa. If left untreated, lymph node swelling can lead to chronic fatigue, impaired immune function, and increased risk of infections, negatively impacting daily life and overall well-being.
